title: Simply Optimized 2
description: The successor to the well known and researched modpack Simply Optimized - maintaining the focus on pure performance.
body:
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/VQZy201w?logo=modrinth&label=DOWNLOADS&color=2DCE89&style=for-the-badge)](https://s1a.uk/sop2)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1299417829581520918?logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD&color=5865F2&style=for-the-badge)](https://s1a.uk/discord) [![Mod Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-dcd4b4?style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net)
# Simply Optimized 2

After the recent exit from the modpack community by the original Simply Optimized creator, I have taken it upon myself to update and rejuvenate the project

## Performance gains:

### Without Simply Optimized 2: 290 fps
### With Simply Optimized 2: 403 fps

All measurements were taken on a PC with the specs: i5-11600K, GTX 1660 Ti and 32GB RAM on everything as default (16 render, 12 simulation, fancy) except for uncapping the frame rate and turning VSync off

## What does Simply Optimized 2 do?
- It aims to keep your game as **light and vanilla feeling as possible** with maximum performance gains. If you just want a quick way to get all of the optimization mods in one click, you can use this modpack for that
- It stays updated, so whenever there is a new update, Simply Optimized 2 is the modpack you can go to

## What makes Simply Optimized 2 different?
 
- Other modpacks may add extra bloat mods or mods which aren't needed for your use case, so you can build off this modpack and only add what you actually need!
- In comparison to Simply Optimized, I have removed a couple of the mods in there because they tweak some of the vanilla features, like for example ServerCore reducing villager ticking and BadOptimizations not making a huge difference.

## If you have issues with the modpack:
- Please join the [discord](https://s1a.uk/discord-sop2-help)
